name: General Quiz
subject: Test your first aid knowledge
preheader: Take our quiz to find out how much you remember from your class

blocks.text: It's been a while since your Daisy First Aid class and we wondered how much you remember...
What do you need to do to save a child from choking?
Do you remember the signs of anaphylaxis?
How many rescue breaths did you need to do...?
First aid knowledge is something that we hope that we don't need to put into practice, but if you aren't using the knowledge from your class regularly, then you'll be surprised how much you forget.
If you'd like to book a refresher class, you can find your local trainer on our website, see their availability and book online.
